name: Old Fashioned
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: Maple Bourbon Sour
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: Whiskey Sour
directions: Add bourbon, lemon juice, simple syrup, and egg white to a shaker, dry shake (without ice) 30 seconds
Add ice and shake again for 15-20 seconds
Strain into a rocks glass over ice
Garnish with 3-4 drops of Angostura bitters

name: Amaretto Sour
directions: Add amaretto, bourbon, lemon juice, simple syrup and egg white to a shaker and dry-shake (no ice) for 15 seconds.
Add ice and shake again until well-chilled.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lemon twist and 2 skewered brandied cherries.

name: Gold Rush
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: Brown Derby
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Fine strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: Spiced Manhattan
directions: Add the bourbon, vermouth, and bitters in a stirring glass with ice. Stir gently.
Strain into martini or coupe glass
Garnish with cinnamon stick and cherry

name: Skeleton Key
directions: Add bourbon, St. Germain, and lemon juice to glass with ice
Top with ginger beer
Top with bitters

name: Autumn Rickey
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice and add the lime wheels
Add the maple syrup, lime juice, and bourbon
Top with club soda, stir to combine

name: The Tender Knob
directions: In a shaker, muddle 1 apple slice
Add the bourbon, apple cider, agave nectar, and cinnamon to a shaker with ice. Shake until well chilled
Strain into a glass with fresh ice (Do not double strain, you want some apple bits)
Garnish with the remaining apple slice

name: Raspberry Truffle Smash
ingredients: 1/2 oz simple syrup (adjust based on jam sweetness)
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, shake until chilled
Strain into rocks glass

name: Sazerac
directions: Add sugar, bitters, and whiskey to a mixing glass. If using a sugar cube, muddle and break up the sugar
Add ice, stir for 30 seconds
Pour small amount of absinthe to drinking glass, run around the inside to coat, pour out extra
Strain mix into drinking glass without ice
Garnish with lemon peel

name: Cold Brew Old Fashioned
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: S'mores Old Fashioned
directions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into rocks glass over a large ice cube

name: Apple Cider Whiskey Sour
directions: Add ingredients to shaker, dry shake 10 seconds
Add ice, shake another 10 seconds to chill
Strain into glass with giant ice cube

name: Nuts and Berries
ingredients: A few dashes of chocolate or walnut bitters
directions: Add ingredients to glass with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into glass with large ice cube

name: I'm on Fire
directions: Combine all ingredients in a mixing tin, shake with ice
Strain into a chilled rocks glass over large ice cube
Garnish with ancho chili powder

name: Oaxaca Old Fashioned
ingredients: 1/2 ounce Del Maguey San Luis Del Rio mezcal
directions: Combine all the ingredients except the orange twist in an Old-Fashioned glass filled with one large ice cube.
Stir until chilled.
Top with a flamed orange twist, then drop the twist into the drink.

name: Mezcal Paloma
directions: Rub a lime wedge around the edge of a highball glass, and dip the rim in salt and Tajín (optional).
Add the tequila and lime juice to the glass, and fill with ice.
Top with grapefruit soda, and stir briefly and gently to combine.
Garnish with a lime wedge.

name: Mezcal Margarita
ingredients: 3/4 ounce fresh lime juice, peel reserved
directions: Combine mezcal, lime juice, triple sec, and ice  in a cocktail shaker. Shake until frosty (about 30 seconds)
Add salt rim to glass. Fill glass with ice
Strain margarita into glass, garnish with lime wedge

name: Zapatero
ingredients: 1 dash Fee Brothers Aztec chocolate bitters
directions: Add the mezcal, bourbon, orgeat, Angostura bitters and Aztec chocolate bitters into a mixing glass with ice and stir until well-chilled.
Strain into an Old Fashioned glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with cinnamon, cranberry and an orange twist.

name: Margarita
directions: Add tequila, orange liqueur, lime juice and agave syrup to a cocktail shaker filled with ice, and shake until well-chilled.
Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel and kosher salt rim (optional).

name: Tommy's Margarita
directions: Rub the rim of a rocks glass with a lime wedge, dip the rim in salt to coat, and set aside.
Add the tequila, lime juice, and agave nectar to a shaker with ice.
Shake until well-chilled.
Strain over fresh ice into the prepared glass.

name: Margarita Negra
directions: Salt the rim of the drinking glass
Combine all ingredients in a shaker with ice, shake
Pour into glass

name: Elder Smoke
directions: Put all ingredients except cranberry into a shaker
Add ice to shaker, shake for 8-10 seconds
Add ice or large cube to rocks glass, strain cocktail into glass
Pour in cranberry juice near the edge of the glass
Garnish with grapefruit peel

name: Bees Knees
directions: Add ingredients to cocktail shaker with ice and shake well
Pour into glass over ice

name: Lavender Love Cocktail
directions: Add gin, lemon juice, lavender syrup, vanilla extract and ice to cocktail shaker, shake until chilled
Strain into cocktail glass, top with seltzer

name: Lavender Tom Collins
directions: Add gin, lemon juice, and syrup to a tall glass
Fill glass with ice, top with seltzer, stir

name: Gin Buck
directions: Add gin and lemon juice to a tall glass
Fill glass with ice, top with ginger ale, stir

name: Sunflower
directions: Add gin, cointreau, st germaine, lemon juice to shaker with ice. Shake.
Rinse cocktail glass with absinthe, strain cocktail into glass

name: Bramble
directions: Add gin, lemon juice and simple syrup to a shaker with ice. Shake until chilled
Strain cocktail into glass over crushed ice
Slowly pour the Chambord over the top

name: The Goldwyn Follies
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice, shake until chilled
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass or coupe glass
Garnish with 2 thin apple slices

name: Army & Navy
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice, shake until chilled
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass or coupe glass

name: Pina Colada
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice, shake until chilled
Strain into a glass with ice

name: Spiced Rum Apple Cider Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice, shake until chilled
Strain into a glass with ice

name: Dark and Stormy
directions: Add rum and lime juice to a tall glass with ice
Top with ginger beer

name: Maple Old Fashioned
directions: Add rum, maple syrup, and bitters to mixing glass with ice, stir until chilled
Strain into a chilled cocktail glass, garnish with an orange twist

name: Sinister Suggestion
directions: Add all ingredients to mixing glass with ice. Stir until chilled
Serve in rocks glass over cube

name: The Beaten Trail - V1
directions: Add all ingredients to mixing glass and stir
Add ice to glass and stir to chill
Pour into glass over ice cube, and float 3-5 drops of cocoa bitters

name: The Beaten Trail - V2
ingredients: 1 1/2 oz white rum (preferably Maggie's Farm Hidden Harbor)
directions: Add all ingredients to mixing glass and stir
Add ice to glass and stir to chill
Pour into glass over ice cube, and float 3-5 drops of cocoa bitters

name: The Beaten Trail - V3
ingredients: 1.0 oz white rum (preferably Maggie's Farm Hidden Harbor)
directions: Add all ingredients to mixing glass and stir
Add ice to glass and stir to chill
Pour into glass over ice cube, and float 3-5 drops of cocoa bitters

name: The Beaten Trail - V4
ingredients: 2 oz unrefined coconut oil washed white rum
directions: Add all ingredients to mixing glass and stir
Add ice to glass and stir to chill
Pour into glass over ice cube, and float 3-5 drops of cocoa bitters
